text: - **Turn edges/channel/distill are observed, not pushed from the RPC handlers.** `rpc_turn_start`/`rpc_turn_end` still only mutate the store; the per-session runtime loop observes `working`/channels each obs tick (5s) and drives the reconciler. This keeps a single driver (no split-brain) and matches the old cadence, but adds up to one obs-interval of latency for the busy publish (still far better than the old ~30s heartbeat-only busy publish). Deliberate — routing RPC handlers through the shared reconciler too would re-introduce two drivers.
